checks.finding: Every task references existing REQ and AC identifiers.
Precheck reports valid blocker formatting; blocker values are None or valid task IDs.
REQ-001 through REQ-012 are covered by at least one task.
AC-001 through AC-014 are covered by at least one task.
Each task maps to requirements and acceptance criteria and contributes to the specified feature.
Every acceptance criterion maps to a planned task and test target.
All six tasks begin with Approval Draft and Status Planned.
Each task declares a recognized risk level, rationale, and required workflow.
Acceptance-criterion ownership is nonduplicative across the task decomposition.
Declared blockers and the dependency graph consistently encode T-001/T-002 before T-003, T-003 before T-004/T-005, and T-004/T-005 before T-006.
Each task has a cohesive implementation concern with bounded scope and explicit exclusions.
Each task provides inspectable completion outcomes, executable verification commands or fixtures, and evidence-artifact expectations.
Task requirements, acceptance criteria, statuses, and code/test targets agree with traceability.md.
